lines.speaker: Man
lines.content: Emma, we have been together for five years. You have made every day of my life brighter.
lines.cn: 艾玛，我们在一起五年了。你让我生命中的每一天都更加明亮。

lines.speaker: Woman
lines.content: That is so sweet. You are making me blush. What is going on?
lines.cn: 太甜了。你让我脸红了。怎么了？

lines.speaker: Man
lines.content: I want to spend the rest of my life with you. I cannot imagine my future without you in it.
lines.cn: 我想和你共度余生。我无法想象没有你的未来。

lines.speaker: Woman
lines.content: Are you serious? I feel the same way, but I did not expect this tonight.
lines.cn: 你是认真的吗？我也有同样的感觉，但我没想到今晚。

lines.speaker: Man
lines.content: I have been planning this for months. I wanted everything to be perfect for you.
lines.cn: 我策划了好几个月。我想让一切都对你完美。

lines.speaker: Woman
lines.content: You are already perfect to me. Look at you, you are nervous and adorable right now.
lines.cn: 你对我来说已经够完美了。看看你，现在又紧张又可爱。

lines.speaker: Man
lines.content: Emma, will you marry me? Will you be my partner, my best friend, forever?
lines.cn: 艾玛，你愿意嫁给我吗？你愿意成为我的伴侣、我最好的朋友，直到永远吗？

lines.speaker: Woman
lines.content: Yes, a thousand times yes! I love you so much. This is the happiest moment of my life.
lines.cn: 愿意，一千次愿意！我太爱你了。这是我一生中最幸福的时刻。

lines.speaker: Man
lines.content: I love you too. Let us put this ring on your finger. It fits perfectly.
lines.cn: 我也爱你。让我们把这个戒指戴在你手指上。尺寸正好。

lines.speaker: Woman
lines.content: It is beautiful. I am going to call my mom right now. She is going to be so excited!
lines.cn: 太美了。我现在就给我妈打电话。她一定会非常激动的！
